evals.prompt: Analyze the open GitHub issues in this repo and determine which ones depend on others by checking 'Blocked by' references in issue bodies
evals.expected_output: A dependency graph grouping issues into waves based on their blocker relationships.
assertions: Runs gh issue list to fetch open issues
Parses issue bodies for 'Blocked by' lines
Groups issues into numbered waves by dependency depth
Issues with no blockers are in Wave 1

evals.prompt: Launch a wave of parallel agents to implement all Wave 1 issues from the dependency graph
evals.expected_output: Multiple specialist agents launched in parallel, each implementing one issue with full context and conventions.
assertions: Uses Task tool to launch sub-agents
Each agent receives the full issue body and design token context
Agents are launched in parallel (up to 4 max)
Each agent creates a component file following BEM conventions
